text:
Created attachment 253156
Update SABnzbd and sabctools v4

Took a bit to understand #2. The SABnzbd-X.X.X-src file from GitHub includes all the compiled languages, so I had to change to the source code instead.

#1 Fixed
#2 Only copied the locale folder when NLS is enabled, as the po folder is not used outside of generating the email/*.tmpl and the locale/*/LC_MESSAGES/SABnzbd.mo files.
#3 Fixed and removed unnecessary *.po files
